steps.title: Target the removal claim
steps.content: The sentence must support the claim that people tend to overlook removing things as a way to improve. The clearest support would show far fewer subtractive suggestions than additive suggestions.

steps.title: Compare the relevant categories
steps.content: Choice A leaves out subtractive suggestions. Choice B compares invalid responses, which are not useful for judging improvement ideas. Choice D misreads the graph by assigning the roughly 175 count to subtractive suggestions. The needed contrast is subtractive versus additive. The answer is C.
